framing: Laid-off underwriter at Zurich seeking product role at insurtech startup in Berlin

jd.title: Senior Product Manager — Commercial Lines
jd.style_note: Enterprise SaaS: structured requirements, specific insurance domain knowledge, platform-focused

requirements.text: 5+ years of experience in insurance, insurtech, or B2B SaaS product management
Deep understanding of commercial insurance underwriting workflows and rating engines
Experience with API-first insurance platforms or embedded insurance distribution
Proficiency in product analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel, or Pendo)
Experience writing PRDs and working with engineering teams using Jira and Confluence
Knowledge of Solvency II regulatory requirements and EIOPA guidelines
Experience with Guidewire, Duck Creek, or Socotra insurance platforms

responsibilities: Own the commercial lines product roadmap for wefox's B2B insurance platform
Define underwriting workflow automation features for broker and MGA partners
Collaborate with data science team on pricing model integration and risk scoring APIs
Manage stakeholder alignment across insurance carriers, brokers, and engineering
Drive product discovery through user research with insurance professionals across DACH region

expected_output.summary: Insurance professional with 7 years of underwriting experience at Zurich Insurance (London), most recently Senior Underwriter in Commercial Property. Led underwriting for GBP 80M portfolio across UK mid-market commercial property risks. Made redundant in Q1 2026 during Zurich's global operations restructuring. Deep domain expertise in commercial lines rating, pricing models, and broker distribution. Seeking transition from underwriting to insurtech product management.

experience.title: Senior Underwriter — Commercial Property
bullets: Underwrote GBP 80M commercial property portfolio across UK mid-market segment (SME and mid-corporate)
Developed pricing guidelines and referral rules for automated quoting platform (Guidewire PolicyCenter)
Trained and mentored 3 junior underwriters on risk assessment and broker relationship management
Collaborated with actuarial team on loss ratio analysis and reserve adequacy reviews
Achieved combined ratio of 94% across managed portfolio, 6 points below divisional average

experience.title: Underwriter — Commercial Property (promoted from Graduate Trainee, 2021)
bullets: Completed Zurich's 2-year graduate programme rotating through underwriting, claims, and actuarial
Assessed and quoted commercial property risks up to GBP 5M sum insured
Built Excel-based pricing tools for quick-quote scenarios used by 8 underwriters in the team
Passed CII Diploma in Insurance (Dip CII) examinations

certifications: Certificate in Insurance — Chartered Insurance Institute (2020)

jd_requirements: 5+ years insurance insurtech B2B SaaS product management
commercial insurance underwriting workflows rating engines
API-first insurance platforms embedded insurance distribution
Guidewire Duck Creek Socotra insurance platforms
deliberate_flaws: No product management experience — entire career in underwriting (domain expert, not PM)
No experience with product analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel, Pendo)
No experience writing PRDs or working with engineering teams
No API or platform experience — used Guidewire as end-user, never configured it
No Duck Creek or Socotra experience
No Solvency II regulatory knowledge (underwriter, not compliance/risk)
Laid-off framing — redundancy may require explanation in interviews
No startup or insurtech experience — only traditional insurance carrier
No Jira or Confluence experience (used internal Zurich project tools)

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
